title: The Cox standard: Rethinking intermediary liability in the digital age
description: The exponential growth of digital technologies has fundamentally transformed the creation, dissemination and consumption of copyrighted content. Intermediaries, ranging from internet service providers (ISPs) to social media platforms, occupy a central position in this ecosystem by facilitating access to and transmission of user-generated content.However, this functional centrality has also placed intermediaries at the heart of a persistent legal dilemma: their liability for unlawful or infringin
